🇫🇷 Day 3 — Days of the Week & Time

Progress: Day 3 of 90 · 25 words
← Day 2 📋 All Lessons Day 4 →

📖 Section 1 — Vocabulary

lundi noun
Monday
🇫🇷 Le lundi, je travaille.
🇺🇸 On Mondays, I work.
mardi noun
Tuesday
🇫🇷 On se retrouve mardi.
🇺🇸 We'll meet on Tuesday.
mercredi noun
Wednesday
🇫🇷 Mercredi, il n'y a pas d'école.
🇺🇸 On Wednesday, there's no school.
jeudi noun
Thursday
🇫🇷 Le rendez-vous est jeudi.
🇺🇸 The appointment is on Thursday.
vendredi noun
Friday
🇫🇷 On sort vendredi soir.
🇺🇸 We're going out Friday evening.
samedi noun
Saturday
🇫🇷 Samedi, je me repose.
🇺🇸 On Saturday, I rest.
dimanche noun
Sunday
🇫🇷 Le dimanche, on mange en famille.
🇺🇸 On Sundays, we eat as a family.
aujourd'hui adverb
today
🇫🇷 Aujourd'hui, il fait beau.
🇺🇸 Today, the weather is nice.
demain adverb
tomorrow
🇫🇷 À demain !
🇺🇸 See you tomorrow!
hier adverb
yesterday
🇫🇷 Hier, j'ai mangé une pizza.
🇺🇸 Yesterday, I ate a pizza.
maintenant adverb
now
🇫🇷 Je dois partir maintenant.
🇺🇸 I have to leave now.
quelle heure est-il phrase
what time is it
🇫🇷 Quelle heure est-il ? Il est trois heures.
🇺🇸 What time is it? It is three o'clock.
matin noun
morning
🇫🇷 Je bois du café le matin.
🇺🇸 I drink coffee in the morning.
soir noun
evening
🇫🇷 Bonne soirée !
🇺🇸 Have a nice evening!
semaine noun
week
🇫🇷 Cette semaine, je suis très occupé.
🇺🇸 This week, I'm very busy.
apres-midi noun
afternoon
🇫🇷 On se retrouve cet apres-midi ?
🇺🇸 Shall we meet this afternoon?
nuit noun
night
🇫🇷 Bonne nuit, a demain.
🇺🇸 Good night, see you tomorrow.
midi noun
noon
🇫🇷 On dejeune a midi.
🇺🇸 We have lunch at noon.
minuit noun
midnight
🇫🇷 Le film finit a minuit.
🇺🇸 The movie ends at midnight.
heure noun
hour / o'clock
🇫🇷 Il faut une heure en train.
🇺🇸 It takes one hour by train.
minute noun
minute
🇫🇷 Attends deux minutes !
🇺🇸 Wait two minutes!
avant preposition
before
🇫🇷 Brosse-toi les dents avant de dormir.
🇺🇸 Brush your teeth before sleeping.
apres preposition
after
🇫🇷 On se retrouve apres le travail.
🇺🇸 We meet after work.
pendant preposition
during
🇫🇷 Pendant le cours, ecoute bien.
🇺🇸 During class, listen carefully.
bientot adverb
soon
🇫🇷 A bientot, j'espere !
🇺🇸 See you soon, I hope!

🧠 Section 3 — Quiz

What does 'apres' mean?
How do you say 'minute' in French?
Fill in the blank: A ______, j'espere !
What does 'soir' mean?
How do you say 'afternoon' in French?
